10659437.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life
10659437.description: Paul Hollywood returns to his Merseyside roots and family, with ginger biscuits, coconut tray bake, millionaire's shortbread, and his dad's floury baps on the menu.

10659539.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10659539.description: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters.

10660329.title: Silent Witness
10660329.description: The Lyell team investigate the shooting of a family who were picnicking by a river.

10661452.title: Father Brown
10661452.description: When Lady Felicia's home comes under threat due to a diamond that she refused to sell to a Russian, Father Brown must seek help from an unlikely ally.

10662366.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10662366.description: Tracking a local conman, Frank and Lu make some unlikely allies when they encounter a pair of deadly gangsters.

10663288.title: Impossible
10663288.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

10664215.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
10664215.description: Frank and Lu must recover a precious jewel and a rebellious teenager before midnight strikes at Lady Bede's End of Summer Ball.

10664366.title: Bargain Hunt
10664366.description: Anita Manning presents from Hemswell Antiques Centre in Lincolnshire with experts Christina Trevanion and Nick Hall. There is magic in the air as a magician and his assistant take on a mother and daughter to buy three items that will hopefully make a profit at auction.
